Records.description: One-loop massive three-point (vertex/triangle) integral with three distinct internal masses and three off-shell external legs, expressed in closed form as an Appell $F_1$ double hypergeometric function of kinematic variables $(x,y)$. The paper performs the epsilon expansion ($d=4-2\varepsilon$) of $F_1(1-\varepsilon, 1, 1/2, 2-\varepsilon, x, y)$ by first analytically continuing $F_1$ onto a region where $|1/(1-x)|<1$ and applying the authors' Taylor/Laurent-expansion methodology, giving coefficients through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$ as linear combinations of Kampe de Feriet / $F_1$ / $F_2$-type hypergeometric functions. Numerical cross-check at $(x,y) = (11.1 - i \cdot 10^{-12}, 12.1 - i \cdot 10^{-12})$ against Table B.2 of Phan:2018cnz.
Records.familyName: one-loop massive vertex (triangle) via Appell F1
Records.location: Section: Taylor series of Appell F_1 (Eq. B.2 of Phan:2018cnz reproduced as F1((d-2)/2,1,1/2,d/2,x_c,y_c))

Records.description: Fully massive one-loop triangle with 3 distinct propagator masses and 3 distinct external masses (6 scales), computed to $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$. Decomposed into 6 orthoschemes via projective dissection of hyperbolic simplex. All square roots rationalized. First explicit MPL result at higher $\varepsilon$ orders for the generic massive triangle.
Records.familyName: fully massive 1-loop triangle (6 scales, higher eps)

Records.description: One-loop three-edge cycle (triangle) graph with all three internal masses m_1,m_2,m_3 non-vanishing and all three external momenta q_1,q_2,q_3 non-vanishing. Symanzik polynomials: Psi_G = alpha_1+alpha_2+alpha_3, Xi_G = q_1^2 alpha_2 alpha_3 + q_2^2 alpha_1 alpha_3 + q_3^2 alpha_1 alpha_2 + (m_1^2 alpha_1 + m_2^2 alpha_2 + m_3^2 alpha_3) Psi_G. Section 4 studies the full graph motive mot_G = H^2(P^2 \ (Q union L), Delta \ (Q union L) cap Delta)/S, computes its weight graded pieces (Lemma `triangle-general`: gr^W mot_G = Q(-2) + Q(-1)^5 + Q(0)) and the motivic Galois coaction. Result: weight 2 dilog.
Records.location: Section 1.4 (subsubsection 'The triangle graph', figure `general-triangle`, Eq. for Psi_G and Xi_G); Section 4.1 (motive of the triangle graph)

Names: one-loop massive vertex (triangle) via Appell F1
fully massive 1-loop triangle (6 scales, higher eps)
